inputs.label: Annual Production Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total annual production volume in tons. Based on typical manufacturing throughput metrics (ISO 22400).

inputs.label: Grade Change Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Number of grade changes per year. Common in process industries (e.g., steel, paper, chemicals) where product specifications change.

inputs.label: Off-Spec Time per Change
inputs.businessContext: Average time per grade change during which product is off-specification. Based on SMED principles and process transition data.

inputs.label: Wash Time per Change
inputs.businessContext: Average time per grade change for washing/cleaning equipment. Critical for contamination prevention (ISO 9001).

inputs.label: Production Rate
inputs.businessContext: Average production rate during normal operation. Key performance indicator (OEE).

inputs.label: Cost per Ton
inputs.businessContext: Variable cost per ton of product. Includes raw materials, energy, labor (standard costing).

inputs.label: Off-Spec Recovery Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of off-spec material that can be recovered/reprocessed. Typical range 0-100% based on process capability.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy. Used for risk-adjusted outputs (ISO 31000).

thresholds.offSpecTimePerChange: if > 4 then 'High off-spec time - consider SMED improvements'
thresholds.washTimePerChange: if > 2 then 'Excessive wash time - evaluate cleaning procedures'
thresholds.offSpecRecoveryRate: if < 30 then 'Low recovery rate - investigate reprocessing efficiency'

hiddenLossDrivers: if offSpecTimePerChange > 4 then 'Excessive off-spec time per change'
if washTimePerChange > 2 then 'Excessive wash time per change'
if offSpecRecoveryRate < 30 then 'Low off-spec recovery rate'
suggestedActions: Implement SMED to reduce grade change time
Optimize cleaning procedures to reduce wash time
Improve process control to minimize off-spec production
Enhance reprocessing capability to increase recovery rate
